ASBESTOS DISCOVERY 220, DEFENDANT JOHN CRANE INC.'S DEMURRER AND MOTION TO STRIKE. ARGUED AND TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH FIVE DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO PROVIDE PLAINTIFFS AN OPPORTUNITY, IF THEY ARE ABLE, TO IDENTIFY EACH PRODUCT ATTRIBUTABLE TO DEFENDANT THAT ALLEGEDLY CAUSED INJURY. (BOCKRATH V. ALDRICH CHEMICAL (1999) 21 CAL. 4TH 71, 80). DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO STRIKE IS MOOT IN LIGHT OF THE RULING ON THE DEMURRER. HOWEVER, AS GUIDANCE FOR THE PARTIES, ABSENT THE RULING ON THE DEMURRER, THE MOTION TO STRIKE WOULD BE DENIED BECAUSE THERE ARE SUFFICIENT ALLEGATIONS OF MALICE, FRAUD AND OPPRESSION AND NO REQUIREMENT THAT PLAINTIFFS' ALLEGATIONS BE STATED SEPARATELY AS TO THE MOVING DEFENDANT FROM THE OTHER DEFENDANTS. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO CSR # 8600

TRIAL MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-05-2010 IN 220, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PREFERENCE COMES ON CALENDAR FOR A CONTINUED HEARING TO SET A TRIAL DATE AFTER PREFERENCE WAS GRANTED. AFTER THE COURT AND COUNSEL CONFERRED, TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 6/7/10 AT 11:15 A.M. IN DEPT. 206. AUTHORIZATION IS DUE BY THE END OF DAY ON 4/5/10. THE COURT SETS THREE BRIEFING SCHEDULES FOR DEFENDANTS' MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AS FOLLOWS: GROUP 1 - NOTICE IS DUE BY 5/10/10, OPPOSITION IS DUE BY 5/17/10, REPLY IS DUE BY 5/20, HEARING DATE IS 5/25/10; GROUP 2 - NOTICE IS DUE BY 5/13/10, OPPOSITION IS DUE BY 5/20/10, REPLY IS DUE BY 5/25, HEARING DATE IS 5/28/10; GROUP 3 - NOTICE IS DUE BY 5/17/10, OPPOSITION IS DUE BY 5/24/10, REPLY IS DUE BY 5/27/10, HEARING DATE IS 6/1/10. THE REMAINING 32 DEFENDANTS ARE TO COORDINATE THEIR HEARING DATES THROUGH BERRY & BERRY SO THAT EACH HEARING DATE WILL HAVE EQUAL NUMBERS OF MOTIONS. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION MAY BE SET FOR THE SAME HEARING DATE AS THE CORRESPONDING DEFENDANT'S MSJ HEARING DATE. PLAINTIFF'S DEMAND IS DUE BY 1:00 P.M. ON 6/1/10. PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO APPEAR ON 6/2/10 AT 9:00 A.M. IN ROOM 603 FOR MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. NO DISCOVERY MOTIONS MAY BE FILED WITHOUT PRIOR APPROVAL OF THE COURT. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO SET UP A CONFERENCE CALL FOR MONDAY, 4/12/10, AT 2:30PM IN DEPT. 220, TO UPDATE THE COURT ON DISCOVERY RESPONSES, ON SUBMISSION OF RADIOLOGY AND PATHOLOGY TO BERRY & BERRY, AND ON G.O. 129.
